The '''''Crix''-class diplomatic courier shuttle''', also designated as '''DC-4a''', was a diplomatic [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and later by the [[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Galactic_Alliance_shuttle_shuttleblueprints.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Top and side profile of a ''Crix''-class diplomatic shuttle.]]
The ''Crix''-class displayed certain characteristics of both [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] designs as well as some [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari]] features, given their cooperation on the design. The [[Hull/Legends|hulls]] showed the Mon Cal influence, while the interior, bridge and engines were very Corellian.<ref name="LECG" />

It had an armored shell with a narrow slot between the halves for the engines, cockpit and weapons. It also had a long, narrow fin mounted on the upper hull which contained powerful long-range communication arrays. The DC-4a was lightly armed and had a set of exposed light laser cannons that were controlled by the pilot. It also included a retractable turret in the lower hull that housed blaster cannons. An alternate variant of the vessel, [[Crix-class assault shuttle|''Crix''-class assault shuttle]] or A-2s also existed, with heavier armor, firepower and shielding.<ref name="LECG" />

==History==
The jointly-designed ''Crix''-class was named after [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]]/[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]], based on his [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] background and for his effort to save [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] during the [[Battle of Calamari|invasion]] of the [[World Devastator]]s over a century earlier.<ref name="LECG" />

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]] used a [[Unidentified Crix-class diplomatic courier shuttle|DC-4a shuttle]] to reach [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] for a meeting with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mingo Bovark]] of [[Roan Fel]]'s [[Fel Empire|Imperial]] loyalists. After using [[Command Override Limpet Droid]]s to take control of a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] on Bovark's [[Nune-class Imperial shuttle|''Nune''-class Imperial shuttle]], Stazi's shuttle was targeted. The shuttle managed to raise its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] in time, and after Admiral Stazi boarded the shuttle, it left the Wheel.

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 9|''Legacy'' (2006) 9]] {{1st}}
